name: Hollandaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Served with fish, yields 1 cup.
2. In the top of a double boiler, heat beaten egg yolks over low heat.
3. Gradually add butter, one tablespoon at a time, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Cook over hot water, not boiling or it will curdle, until thickened.
5. Gradually add water and lemon juice while stirring.
6. Add salt.
